messages.banFail: I could not ban that user. Check my role is above theirs.
messages.kickFail: I could not kick that user. Check my role is above theirs.
messages.muteFail: I could not mute that user. Ensure the mute role exists and is below my role.
messages.warnSuccess: **{user}** has been warned. They now have {count} warning(s). Reason: {reason}
messages.warningsCleared: All warnings for **{user}** have been cleared.

messages.panelDescription: Choose a category below to open a support ticket. A thread will be created in this channel.
messages.threadCreated: Your ticket has been created! Please describe your issue here.
messages.closeInstruction: A staff member will assist you shortly. Use the button below to close this ticket when done.
messages.addSuccess: **{user}** has been added to this ticket.
messages.addFail: Could not add that user to the ticket.
messages.removeSuccess: **{user}** has been removed from this ticket.
messages.removeFail: Could not remove that user from the ticket.
messages.escalateSuccess: This ticket has been escalated. Support manager has been notified.
messages.escalateFail: Escalation failed. Check that `supportManagerRoleId` is set in config.

messages: **Who are we?** We're a friendly community! Say hi in chat.
**Need help?** Open a ticket using the button above!
**Rules:** Be kind, no spam, and have fun!
**Tip:** Use the correct channels for off-topic and support.
**Welcome!** New here? Introduce yourself in the intro channel.
